creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: amdmi3
Date: Mon Feb  4 01:46:42 2013
New Revision: 311537
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/311537

Log:
  - Update MASTER_SITES and WWW
  
  PR:		175702
  Submitted by:	"Daniel W. Steinbrook" <dsteinbrook@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/sysutils/keep/Makefile
  head/sysutils/keep/pkg-descr

Modified: head/sysutils/keep/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/keep/Makefile	Mon Feb  4 01:43:22 2013	(r311536)
+++ head/sysutils/keep/Makefile	Mon Feb  4 01:46:42 2013	(r311537)
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@ PORTNAME=	keep
 PORTVERSION=	0.4.0
 PORTREVISION=	7
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils kde
-MASTER_SITES=	http://jr.falleri.free.fr/files/devel/keep/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://fossies.org/unix/privat/old/
 
 MAINTAINER=	dsteinbrook@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	A backup system for KDE

Modified: head/sysutils/keep/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/keep/pkg-descr	Mon Feb  4 01:43:22 2013	(r311536)
+++ head/sysutils/keep/pkg-descr	Mon Feb  4 01:46:42 2013	(r311537)
@@ -2,4 +2,4 @@ Keep is a backup system for KDE. The beh
 files you want to backup, you set up the frequency and the number of backup
 you want to have, and Keep will backup them automatically.
 
-WWW: http://jr.falleri.free.fr/keep/
+WWW: http://kde-apps.org/content/show.php?content=32984
